channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GULFPETRO] GP Petroleums Promoter Entity Transfers Equity Shares Due to GST Dues!
item.description:
🔥 Trending

GP Petroleums Ltd. has received a communication from its Promoter entity, Nivaya Resources Private Limited, informing that 6,93,895 equity shares held by them have been transferred from their demat account. The transfer appears to have been made in favour of SBICAP Securities Limited due to a notice issued by the GST Department under Section 79(1)(c) of the CGST Act, 2017, for recovery of government dues. The Company is examining the matter and seeking clarifications from the concerned intermediaries.

  • GP Petroleums Ltd. receives communication from Promoter entity, Nivaya Resources Private Limited.
  • 6,93,895 equity shares held by Nivaya Resources Private Limited transferred from its demat account.
  • Transfer made in favour of SBICAP Securities Limited due to GST Department notice.
  • Company examining the matter and seeking clarifications from concerned intermediaries.
  • No financial impact on the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GP Petroleums Limited | Category: Legal

item.title: [STALLION] Stallion India Fluorochemicals Revises Rights Issue: 3.68 Cr Shares at Rs. 99 Each
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd. has revised the outcome of its Rights Issue Committee of the Board of Directors meeting. Due to a clerical error, the face value of equity shares was mentioned as Re. 1/- instead of Rs. 10/. The correct face value is now updated. The committee approved the allotment of 3,67,60,483 fully paid-up equity shares with a face value of Rs. 10.00/- each on a Rights basis. The allotment is in the ratio of 19:41 i.e. 19 (Nineteen) Rights Equity Shares for every 41 (Forty-One) fully paid-up equity shares held by the eligible equity shareholders. The price per equity share is Rs. 99.00/- per share on the Record date, i.e. 11th February, 2026. The Paid-up Equity Share Capital of the Company will be updated consequent to the said allotment. The lapsed rights entitlements will be extinguished and the ISIN of rights entitlements i.e. INEORYC20010 will be deactivated.

  • Stallion India Fluorochemicals revised the outcome of its Rights Issue Committee of the Board of Directors meeting due to a clerical error.
  • 3,67,60,483 fully paid-up equity shares with a face value of Rs. 10.00/- each will be allotted on a Rights basis.
  • The allotment is in the ratio of 19:41 i.e. 19 (Nineteen) Rights Equity Shares for every 41 (Forty-One) fully paid-up equity shares held.
  • The price per equity share is Rs. 99.00/- per share on the Record date, i.e. 11th February, 2026.
  • Lapsed rights entitlements will be extinguished and the ISIN of rights entitlements i.e. INEORYC20010 will be deactivated.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd | Category: Right Issue

item.title: [HMT] HMT Watches Limited Struck-off from Register of Companies
item.description:
🔥 Trending

HMT Watches Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of HMT Limited, has been struck-off from the Register of Companies under section 248 (2) of the Companies Act, 2013 with effect from 02.03.2026. This decision was announced by HMT Limited in a letter dated 05.01.2026 to the Stock Exchanges, stating that they had filed an application for striking-off HMT Watches Limited with the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Government of India. The subsidiary has been removed from the Register of Companies as of 02.03.2026.

  • HMT Watches Limited has been struck-off from the Register of Companies
  • The decision was made under section 248 (2) of the Companies Act, 2013
  • HMT Limited communicated the decision to the Stock Exchanges on 05.01.2026
  • The subsidiary was removed from the Register of Companies with effect from 02.03.2026
  • The decision was made following the filing of an application with the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Government of India

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HMT LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [VELHO] Velan Hotels Ltd. Faces High Court Case Over 2006 Audi Car Import
item.description:
A writ petition has been filed at the Hon''ble High Court of Madras against an order from The Assistant Commissioner (ST), Commercial Tax Office, Tirupur. The dispute revolves around an Audi Q7 motor vehicle that was imported in 2006 and subsequently registered in 2007. The Assitant Commissioner (ST), Tirupur Central -1 Assessment Circle, Tirupur issued an order after nearly nineteen (19) years from the date of entry of the vehicle into the local area, demanding Entry Tax, Penalty, and Interest. The Company has been directed to pay an Entry Tax of Rs.4,31,292/-, Penalty of Rs.4,31,292/-, and Interest of Rs.20,05,260/-.

  • A writ petition has been filed at the Hon''ble High Court of Madras against an order from The Assistant Commissioner (ST), Commercial Tax Office, Tirupur.
  • The dispute revolves around an Audi Q7 motor vehicle that was imported in 2006 and subsequently registered in 2007.
  • The Assitant Commissioner (ST), Tirupur Central -1 Assessment Circle, Tirupur issued an order after nearly nineteen (19) years from the date of entry of the vehicle into the local area.
  • The Company has been directed to pay an Entry Tax of Rs.4,31,292/-, Penalty of Rs.4,31,292/-, and Interest of Rs.20,05,260/-.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VELAN HOTELS LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [MUTHTFN] Muthoot Capital Services Ltd Raises INR 88.67 Crores Through Sixth Securitization in FY 2025-26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Muthoot Capital Services Limited has successfully completed a securitization transaction, raising an amount of INR 88,67,74,554/- (Rupees Eighty Eight Crores Sixty Seven Lakhs Seventy Four Thousand Five Hundred and Fifty Four only) through the assignment of Two Wheeler Loans receivables totaling INR 93,54,91,079/- (Rupees Ninety Three Crores Fifty Four Lakhs Ninety One Thousand and Seventy Nine only) on March 02, 2026. This is the sixth securitization/direct assignment transaction carried out by the company during the financial year 2025-26. The entire pool is from the non-priority sector, and the transaction aligns with the guidelines prescribed by the Reserve Bank of India.

  • Muthoot Capital Services Ltd raises INR 88.67 crores through securitization
  • Sixth securitization transaction in FY 2025-26
  • INR 93.54 crores worth of Two Wheeler Loans receivables assigned
  • Transaction to be completed on March 02, 2026
  • Entire pool is from the non-priority sector

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MUTHOOT CAPITAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Securitization

item.title: [NMSRESRC] NMS Global Ltd Passes All Resolutions with Required Majority in E-Voting
item.description:
NMS Global Ltd, formerly known as NMS Resources Global Limited, held an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) on Saturday, February 28, 2026, through video conferencing. The meeting was to consider and approve, if thought fit, the resolutions embodied in the Notice of Extraordinary General Meeting. The scrutinizer, Prachi Bansal, Practicing Company Secretary, has released the Scrutinizer's Report on the e-voting process. The company provided the facility for remote e-voting and e-voting during the EGM. The consolidated report on the result of the remote e-voting and e-voting during the EGM in respect of the resolutions as set out in the Notice of the EGM has been passed with the required majority.

  • NMS Global Ltd held an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) on Saturday, February 28, 2026, through video conferencing.
  • The meeting was to consider and approve, if thought fit, the resolutions embodied in the Notice of Extraordinary General Meeting.
  • The scrutinizer, Prachi Bansal, Practicing Company Secretary, has released the Scrutinizer's Report on the e-voting process.
  • The company provided the facility for remote e-voting and e-voting during the EGM.
  • All resolutions were passed with the required majority.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NMS Resources Global Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CUPIDALBV] Cupid Breweries Allots 3,87,08,920 Equity Shares to Rinpoche Spirits Shareholders in Share Swap Deal
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd has allotted 3,87,08,920 equity shares to the shareholders of Rinpoche Spirits Private Limited and 6,51,387 equity shares to the shareholders of Crochet Industries Private Limited. The allotment is pursuant to a share swap deal as per the SEBI regulations. The company has also acquired 100% stake in Rinpoche Spirits Private Limited and is planning to purchase a large alcoholic beverage production capacity unit in Odisha. The company is also opening branch offices in various states to expand business operations.

  • Allotment of 3,87,08,920 equity shares to Rinpoche Spirits shareholders
  • Allotment of 6,51,387 equity shares to Crochet Industries shareholders
  • Acquisition of 100% stake in Rinpoche Spirits Private Limited
  • Planning to purchase a large alcoholic beverage production capacity unit in Odisha
  • Opening branch offices in various states to expand business operations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RMC] RMC Switchgears Ltd. Appoints Mrs. Manisha Godara as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
RMC Switchgears Ltd. has appointed Mrs. Manisha Godara as an Additional Director in the Category of Non-Executive Independent Director with effect from 2nd March, 2026. She holds a Bachelor’s and Master's degree in Commerce, is a member of The Institute of Company Secretaries of India, and has over 12 years of post-qualification experience. She has been in professional practice since 2014 and has handled a diverse range of corporate assignments. She is also an Independent Director for Goyal Salt Ltd. and Sree Jayalakshmi Autospin Limited. She is not related to any director of the company and is not debarred from holding the office of Director by virtue of any SEBI order or any other such authority.

  • Mrs. Manisha Godara appointed as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Over 12 years of post-qualification experience
  • Handled a diverse range of corporate assignments
  • Independent Director for Goyal Salt Ltd. and Sree Jayalakshmi Autospin Limited
  • Not related to any director of the company and not debarred from holding the office of Director

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RMC Switchgears Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [FUSION] Fusion Finance Ltd Seeks No-Objection for Shareholder Reclassification
item.description:
Fusion Finance Ltd has submitted an application to BSE Limited (BSE) and National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) for reclassification of a shareholder from the ‘Promoter and Promoter Group’ category to the ‘Public’ category. This decision is in accordance with Regulation 31A(3) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company will continue to comply with all necessary regulations in the reclassification process.

  • Fusion Finance Ltd seeks no-objection for shareholder reclassification
  • The reclassification is from ‘Promoter and Promoter Group’ category to the ‘Public’ category
  • The application has been submitted to BSE and NSE
  • The decision is in accordance with Regulation 31A(3) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
  • Fusion Finance Ltd is committed to comply with all necessary regulations in the reclassification process

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fusion Micro Finance Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CUPIDALBV] Cupid Breweries Acquires 100% Stake in Rinpoche Spirits and Announces Equity Allotment to Shareholders
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd has approved the acquisition of 100% stake in Rinpoche Spirits Private Limited. The company will allot 3,87,08,920 equity shares of 310/- each at an issue price of 390/- per share to the shareholders of Rinpoche Spirits Private Limited. Additionally, Cupid Breweries will allot 6,51,387 equity shares of 310/- each at an issue price of 390/- per share to the shareholders of Crochet Industries Private Limited. The acquisition is undertaken on an arm’s length basis as per a Valuation Report issued by a SEBI Registered Valuer.

  • Acquisition of 100% stake in Rinpoche Spirits Private Limited
  • Allotment of 3,87,08,920 equity shares to Rinpoche Spirits Private Limited shareholders
  • Allotment of 6,51,387 equity shares to Crochet Industries Private Limited shareholders
  • Transaction is on an arm’s length basis as per a Valuation Report issued by a SEBI Registered Valuer

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd | Category: Acquisitions
